axis_responsibility: Brick: declared work contract, S1 scope, and required return/checker expectations.
Agent: provider-neutral performer contract and absence of AgentFact until a later submitted return exists.
Link: no new authority in S1; existing declared Movement vocabulary remains closed.
Support: adapter resolution, runner parking, support-only records, derived frontier observation, reporter projection, and checker evidence.
candidate_file_changes: support/recording/adapter_error_frontier.py or a new nearby parked-frontier support module if already admitted by checker/profile update
support/checkers/profile YAML or existing checker-profile fixture surfaces for the new pins
project/brick-protocol/status or building-evidence paths only if the Building runner records support evidence for this work
checker_or_verifier_plan: Add profile-backed positive fixture for a parked chat-session Building root.
Sabotage envelope with extra key and UUID/ULID-shaped or free-text session id; checker must go RED, then restored fixture green.
Sabotage park record to match adapter-error shape; checker must go RED, then restored fixture green.
Sabotage observer ordering so parked is read as incomplete/running; checker must go RED, then restored fixture green.
Sabotage reporter map/event admission so parked emits no wake event; checker must go RED, then restored fixture green.
Remove each required path admission independently from both path checkers; each omission must go RED.
Final verification target: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --all exits 0.
returned.design_summary: Design contract: adapter:chat-session is a support adapter kind that never invokes a provider CLI. When encountered by the runner, it raises or returns a typed parked outcome before AgentFact creation. The runner records a closed AgentAdapterRequest projection as the work envelope plus a distinct support-only park record, then stops the walk loudly. Frontier observation derives parked before agent_incomplete, and reporter maps parked to a wake/intervention observed state without making parked a Link state or Movement literal.
edge_cases: adapter:chat-session declared with unexpected provider/session metadata in request projection.
Park record written without matching envelope.
Envelope present but park record malformed or adapter-error-shaped.
Observer sees parked evidence and incomplete AgentFact evidence candidates in the same Building root.
Reporter frontier map admits parked but event-kind frozensets omit it, or the reverse.
Path admitted in one checker but not the other.
Unknown adapter ref near chat-session spelling must not fall back to local adapter behavior.
invariants: adapter:chat-session must not invoke CLI/provider execution.
Parking records support evidence only and must not store credentials, setup tokens, provider sessions, UUID/ULID-shaped session ids, or free-text session identifiers.
Envelope shape is closed to AgentAdapterRequest projection keys only.
Park record shape must be distinguishable from adapter-error shape.
Malformed park state, missing envelope, unknown adapter kind, or inadmissible path must loudly reject.
Frontier parked observation must be ordered before agent_incomplete.
Reporter parked mapping removal must be checker-visible.
All added paths must be admitted by both package path and lifecycle path checkers.
not_proven: Live repository file shapes were not inspected in this return.
No FIRE/RED sabotage run was executed.
Exact existing typed-exception class names and fixture locations remain unverified.
Current reporter map names and frontier observation implementation details remain unverified.
Provider behavior, source truth, success judgment, quality judgment, and Movement authority are not claimed.
observed_evidence: Input is inline task source only; no live repository inspection or checker execution was performed because the packet forbids tools.
Declared S1 scope is pre-step PARK for adapter:chat-session only: typed parked signal, work envelope, park record, frontier observation branch, reporter bell, checker pins, and profile preservation.
S2 submit, S3 resume, scheduler, queue, retry, timer, Link vocabulary edits, and link/ edits are out of scope.

proposed_changes: Add provider-neutral adapter kind adapter:chat-session with typed parked outcome and no CLI invocation path.
Add envelope recording using serialized AgentAdapterRequest projection only, with closed keys and no session/token/free-text provider ids.
Add distinct park record kind/shape separate from adapter-error records.
Wire run.py to record envelope plus park record and stop the lane loudly before AgentFact fabrication.
Add frontier observer branch for parked before agent_incomplete/incomplete-running derivation.
Add reporter closed-map entries so parked emits the intended wake/intervention event family.
Add checker/profile fixtures and sabotage cases for envelope shape, park-vs-error distinction, branch ordering, reporter bell, and both path allowlists.
relevant_current_structure: support/connection/agent_adapter.py owns adapter resolution and existing typed adapter-error precedent.
support/operator/run.py is the single-Building walk integration point.
support/recording/adapter_error_frontier.py is the nearby record/observation precedent but must not be reused shape-identically.
support/recording/contracts.py and support/operator/ledger_projection.py participate in derived frontier observation.
support/operator/reporter.py has closed frontier/event maps that must admit parked wake projection.
support/checkers/check_package_path_admission.py and support/checkers/check_building_lifecycle_path_shape.py both need path admission pins.
returned.returned_summary: local CLI Agent Adapter returned support evidence
unchanged_surfaces: No new Link Movement literal, transition state, gate authority, route target, scheduler, queue, retry, timer, provider runtime, credential store, or session body store.
No AgentFact fabricated for parked chat-session work.
No success, quality, approval, or source-truth judgment in records or projections.
